Package org.attoparser.dom

Interface INestableNode

All Superinterfaces:
INode
All Known Implementing Classes:
Document, Element
public interface INestableNode extends INode

Common interface for all nodes in DOM trees that can have children nodes.

Since:
2.0.0
Author:
Daniel Fernández
